name: Meridian3 Industrials Acquisition Corp
business: A blank check company incorporated to effect a merger or similar business combination, targeting companies in the industrial technology sector with a focus on Industry 4.0, smart manufacturing, and next-generation mobility. It has not selected any specific target or initiated substantive discussions.

exposures.sentence: We believe that the deployment of connected machinery, machine vision, and AI-driven predictive maintenance across factory floors could result in considerable improvements in operational visibility, asset utilization, and throughput for production.

The global industrial economy is undergoing a systemic transformation driven by the integration of artificial intelligence (AI), the industrial internet of things (IIoT), so-called digital twin simulation which relates to a dynamic, real-time virtual simulation of physical objects and systems, and advanced robotics.

We believe that the deployment of connected machinery, machine vision, and AI-driven predictive maintenance across factory floors could result in considerable improvements in operational visibility, asset utilization, and throughput for production.

The global industrial economy is undergoing a systemic transformation driven by the integration of artificial intelligence (AI), the industrial internet of things (IIoT), so-called digital twin simulation which relates to a dynamic, real-time virtual simulation of physical objects and systems, and advanced robotics.

Next-Generation Mobility Revolution: Driven by artificial intelligence, this transition is changing the end-to-end automotive lifecycle, transforming both the actual product that is produced but also the operational functions in the automotive industry, such as digital sales and intelligent supply chains.
The cost of products and services such as sensors, cloud computing, and advanced robotics, has fallen significantly, while connectivity speeds (such as industrial 5G) have exponentially increased.

catalysts.event: Complete initial business combination within 24 months of closing of offering
catalysts.sentence: If we are unable to complete our initial business combination within 24 months of the closing of this offering, the founder shares may expire worthless, except to the extent they receive liquidating distributions from assets outside the trust account.
